name: Apache DolphinScheduler
description: Distributed workflow scheduler for big-data pipelines, originated at Analysys (易观); Apache TLP.

seo.title: Apache DolphinScheduler — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Apache DolphinScheduler: Distributed workflow scheduler for big-data pipelines, originated at Analysys (易观); Apache TLP.

when_to_use: Orchestrating multi-engine big data DAGs (Spark, Flink, Hive)
Scheduling thousands of interdependent ETL tasks visually
Replacing Airflow for teams needing Chinese ecosystem support
Distributed workflow scheduling across large compute clusters
Managing data pipeline retries and SLA monitoring at scale

pros: True distributed scheduler, not just a UI over cron
Supports Spark, Flink, Hive, DataX natively
Apache TLP with active Chinese contributor base
cons: Docs and community skew heavily to Chinese
English support lags behind Airflow ecosystem
Cloud-native deployment less polished than Dagster
review.verdict: Serious Airflow alternative for big-data shops, held back by smaller English-speaking community.
review.best_for: Big-data teams running Spark/Flink who want visual DAG authoring
review.not_for: Python-first data teams deeply invested in the Airflow ecosystem
